fixtureNotes: Single sheet 'Account History' but with HEADER BAND in rows 0-4 (Account/Name/Broker/Currency/Period metadata) followed by section headers 'Closed Trades' and 'Open Trades' with DIFFERENT column schemas. CRITICAL TEST: parser must (a) skip metadata rows 0-4, (b) detect that 'Closed Trades' is a section label not data, (c) re-detect headers when 'Open Trades' section starts (different number of columns), (d) handle multi-table-in-one-sheet pattern unique to MT5. Other edges: YYYY.MM.DD date with dots (MT4-style), fractional volumes (0.05, 0.10, 0.20, 0.50, 0.75, 1.00, 2.00 lots), BTCUSD crypto on forex broker, weekend round-trip EURUSD#3 (open Sat 22:30 → close Sun 02:15).
turnoverNote: Forex/CFD turnover not directly comparable to equity — parser may report 0 or notional, both defensible.
